acceptance_criteria.description: The default local release and acceptance workflow no longer leaves dist artifacts as untracked repo noise.
The fix preserves the existing local commands that generate release and acceptance artifacts under dist paths.
A deterministic local check proves dist artifact paths are ignored while normal tracked repo files remain visible to Git.

edge_cases.description: Previously generated acceptance output under dist stops polluting git status once the ignore rule is present.
Default release output under dist/release is ignored without requiring a custom output directory.
The ignore rule does not hide tracked repo sources outside dist.
